content:
Next Dev Portal has built-in blogging feature.

Just create an `*.mdx` file under `/content/blog` directory. 
Then run the generator too `yarn gen:collections` and you are good to go!

Regular blog authors can be added to `authors.yml`. (Thanks Docusaurus for the idea!)

With [MDX](https://mdxjs.com/) you can embed JSX in the markdown file.


```js
<button onClick={() => alert('button clicked!')}>Click me!</button>
```

<button className="p-2  rounded-md text-blue-500" onClick={() => alert('button clicked!')}>Click me!</button>

meta.title: MDX blog with a relatively long title

## 한글 문서

한글도 참 잘 되요!

우리나라는 아름다운 나라!

## Introduction

The Next Dev Portal allows you to build websites fast.

It is mainly intended for creating (software) product documentation, but it can easily be adapted to serve any kind of website.

Content source files are written in markdown (MDX) and placed under content directory.


You can easily do syntax highlighting as seen below.
```js
const test = {
  "data": "test"
}
```

## The Looplex Services

At our imaginary company Looplex, we provide services that exposes Open API for rapid integration.

The following are the steps to connect to an API and consume services:

1. Browse the list of APIs in the directory
2. Obtain the OpenAPI specification
3. Test client locally with [generated server mocks](https://github.com/stoplightio/prism) 
3. Obtain an API key for the DEV environment
4. Do integration with on DEV environment
5. Obtain an API key for the PROD environment
6. Go LIVE!

## The Amazing Service "A"

Welcome to the Imaginary Service A.

The service A uses `Oauth2 Client Credentials` for the authorization.

The Title Manager is responsible of handling CRUD operations for `title` objects. It supports GET, POST and PUT.

A sample of a response payload is as follows:
```json
{
  "source": "DB",
  "status": "active",
  "name": "My Shiny Title"
}
```

## The Awesome Service "B"

Welcome to the Creativity Service A.

The service B uses `Oauth2 Client Credentials` for the authorization.
